creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
(In reply to Bryan Drewery from comment #2)
Thank-you for looking into this.  Though it is curious. 

~# uname -aKU
FreeBSD hathor 11.0-STABLE FreeBSD 11.0-STABLE #0 r312406M: Fri Jan 20 07:00:10 AEDT 2017     root@hathor:/110002/D/K8/hqdev-amd64-smp-vga  amd64 1100509 1100509

~# sh -c '/usr/sbin/sshd -V 2>&1| grep SSH'
OpenSSH_7.2p2, OpenSSL 1.0.2j-freebsd  26 Sep 2016

~# /usr/sbin/sshd -T
/etc/ssh/sshd_config line 164: Deprecated option HPNDisabled
/etc/ssh/sshd_config line 165: Deprecated option HPNBufferSize
/etc/ssh/sshd_config line 166: Unsupported option NoneEnabled
/etc/ssh/sshd_config line 167: Bad SSH2 cipher spec 'aes256-gcm@openssh.com,chacha20-poly1305@openssh.com,aes256-cbc,aes192-cbc,aes128-cbc,none'.

~# lh /usr/local/sbin/sshd
-rwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel   720K Jan 18 21:51 /usr/local/sbin/sshd*
~# ldd /usr/local/sbin/sshd
/usr/local/sbin/sshd:
        libcrypto.so.38 => /usr/local/lib/libcrypto.so.38 (0x8008d4000)
        libbsm.so.3 => /usr/lib/libbsm.so.3 (0x800cb8000)
        libz.so.6 => /lib/libz.so.6 (0x800ed3000)
        libutil.so.9 => /lib/libutil.so.9 (0x8010ea000)
        libcrypt.so.5 => /lib/libcrypt.so.5 (0x8012fd000)
        libc.so.7 => /lib/libc.so.7 (0x80151b000)

And I build/run security/openssh with 
CFLAGS+= -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -Wl,-z,noexecstack
LDFLAGS+= -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -Wl,-z,noexecstack

Perhaps there's something further afoot.  I'll look further into this, and rebuild on a fresh machine as I need to rebuild world/kernel to test another patch to base.
